$roomId..write: auth != null && ((!data.exists() && newData.child('hostUid').val() === auth.uid) || (data.exists() && data.child('hostUid').val() === auth.uid && !newData.exists()))
$roomId..validate: newData.hasChildren(['name', 'hostUid', 'isLive', 'isLocked']) && newData.child('name').isString() && newData.child('name').val().length > 0 && newData.child('name').val().length <= 80 && newData.child('hostUid').isString() && newData.child('isLive').isBoolean() && newData.child('isLocked').isBoolean()

$uid..write: auth != null && auth.uid === $uid && (data.exists() || root.child('rooms/' + $roomId + '/isLocked').val() !== true || root.child('rooms/' + $roomId + '/hostUid').val() === auth.uid)
$uid..validate: newData.val() === null || (newData.hasChildren(['name', 'currentTask', 'joinedAt', 'isOnline', 'totalTimePreviously', 'lastActiveDay']) && newData.child('name').isString() && newData.child('name').val().length <= 80 && newData.child('currentTask').isString() && newData.child('currentTask').val().length <= 140 && newData.child('joinedAt').isNumber() && newData.child('isOnline').isBoolean() && newData.child('totalTimePreviously').isNumber() && (!newData.hasChild('lastLeftAt') || newData.child('lastLeftAt').isNumber()) && newData.child('lastActiveDay').isString())
